name: 包装展示 / Package Shot
description: 产品包装、礼盒、开箱后的包装展示

defaults.background: clean white or light gray backdrop
defaults.lighting: soft studio lighting, even on all packaging faces
defaults.composition: centered, slight angle to show depth and side

overrides.composition: box closed, clean front panel visible, centered on white
box open, product peeking out, arranged naturally

overrides.background: warm festive backdrop, subtle sparkle or ribbon
overrides.lighting: warm premium lighting with subtle glow
overrides.composition: gift box with ribbon, elegant arrangement
